subject: Re: ✅ FloodClaims Pro is BACK UP
body:
Good news. FloodClaims Pro recovered at 05:22Z — likely Railway finished building after the earlier security fix pushes.

Note: my 9 stuck commits (from the security hardening work) still need to be pushed. Git auth is broken on this machine. Need either:
1. A working GitHub PAT, OR
2. For someone to push from the local repo on this machine

Until those commits are pushed, the security fixes including the ADMIN_PASSWORD fix are only local.

— OWL
